task1.topic: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of using public transportation in large cities.
Discuss the importance of learning English for students in non-English speaking countries.
Explain how technology has changed the way people communicate with each other.
Discuss the benefits of regular exercise for young people.
Describe the impact of social media on students’ academic performance.
Discuss the advantages of living in a small town compared to a big city.
Explain why teamwork is important in the workplace.
Discuss the role of teachers in motivating students to learn.
Describe the benefits of reading books regularly.
Discuss the effects of online shopping on traditional stores.

task2.topic: Some people believe that technology makes life easier, while others think it creates more problems. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
Many people believe that students should learn practical skills at school. Others think academic subjects are more important. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
Online education is becoming more common. Do the advantages outweigh the disadvantages?
Some people think governments should spend more money on public transport, while others believe building roads is more important. Discuss both views.
Many people believe that social media has a negative effect on society. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Some people prefer living in cities, while others prefer living in rural areas. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
The use of smartphones among children is increasing. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this trend?
Some people think university education should be free for everyone. Others believe students should pay for their education. Discuss both views.
Working from home is becoming more popular. Do you think this is a positive or negative development?
Some people believe that competition is good for children, while others think cooperation is better. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
Environmental problems are increasing worldwide. What are the causes and what solutions can be implemented?
Some people believe that advertisements influence people’s choices. Others think people are not affected. Discuss both views.
